SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class IntermediateProofReplayer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.IntermediateProofReplayer
public class IntermediateProofReplayer extends Object
This class is responsible for generating a KeY proof from an intermediate representation generated by IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.

Replay is started using replay(ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProgressMonitor). In the course of replaying, new nodes are added to the supplied proof object. The last goal touched during replay can be obtained by getLastSelectedGoal().

TODO: Check if joining with more than one partner works out of the box. Potential problem: Different order may result in syntactically different nodes.
See Also:
  • IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser

  • Field Details

    • SMT_NOT_RUN

      public static final String SMT_NOT_RUN
      Set as getStatus() if the proof contains SMT steps that didn't reload successfully. Usually occurs if the timeout is set too low.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • IntermediateProofReplayer

      public IntermediateProofReplayer(AbstractProblemLoader loader, Proof proof, IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.Result parserResult)
      Constructs a new IntermediateProofReplayer.
      Parameters:
      loader - The problem loader, for reporting errors.
      proof - The proof object into which to load the replayed proof.
      parserResult - the result of the proof file parser to be replayed

    • IntermediateProofReplayer

      protected IntermediateProofReplayer(AbstractProblemLoader loader, Proof proof)
      Constructs a new IntermediateProofReplayer without initializing the queue of intermediate parsing results. Note that replay(ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener, ProgressMonitor) will not work as expected when using this constructor, but other methods will.
      Parameters:
      loader - The problem loader, for reporting errors.
      proof - The proof object into which to load the replayed proof.

  • Method Details

    • getLastSelectedGoal

      public Goal getLastSelectedGoal()
      Returns:
      the lastSelectedGoal

    • replay

      public IntermediateProofReplayer.Result replay(ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener listener, ProgressMonitor progressMonitor)
      Starts the actual replay process. Results are stored in the supplied proof object; the last selected goal may be obtained by getLastSelectedGoal(). Note: This method deletes the intermediate proof tree!
      Parameters:
      listener - problem initializer listener for the current proof (may be null)
      progressMonitor - progress monitor used to report replay progress (may be null)
      Returns:
      result of the replay procedure (see IntermediateProofReplayer.Result)

    • replay

      public IntermediateProofReplayer.Result replay(ProblemInitializer.ProblemInitializerListener listener, ProgressMonitor progressMonitor, boolean deleteIntermediateTree)
      Starts the actual replay process. Results are stored in the supplied proof object; the last selected goal may be obtained by getLastSelectedGoal().
      Parameters:
      listener - problem initializer listener for the current proof
      progressMonitor - progress monitor used to report replay progress
      deleteIntermediateTree - indicates if the intermediate proof tree should be deleted (set to false if it shal be kept for further use)
      Returns:
      result of the replay procedure (see IntermediateProofReplayer.Result)

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Communicates a non-fatal condition to the caller. Empty string means everything is OK. The message will be displayed to the user in the GUI after the proof has been parsed.

    • getErrors

      public Collection<Throwable> getErrors()
      Returns:
      errors encountered during replay.

    • collectAppsForRule

      public static ImmutableSet<IBuiltInRuleApp> collectAppsForRule(String ruleName, Goal g, PosInOccurrence pos)
      Retrieves all registered applications at the given goal and position for the rule corresponding to the given ruleName.
      Parameters:
      ruleName - Name of the rule to find applications for.
      g - Goal to search.
      pos - Position of interest in the given goal.
      Returns:
      All matching rule applications at pos in g.

    • constructInsts

      public static TacletApp constructInsts(@NonNull TacletApp app, Goal currGoal, Collection<String> loadedInsts, Services services)
      Instantiates schema variables in the given taclet application.
      Parameters:
      app - The taclet application to instantiate.
      currGoal - The corresponding goal.
      loadedInsts - Loaded schema variable instantiations.
      services - The services object.
      Returns:
      The instantiated taclet.

    • parseTerm

      public static JTerm parseTerm(String value, Proof proof, Namespace<QuantifiableVariable> varNS, Namespace<IProgramVariable> progVarNS, Namespace<Function> functNS)
      Parses a given term in String representation.
      Parameters:
      value - String to parse.
      proof - Proof object (for namespaces and Services object).
      varNS - Variable namespace.
      progVarNS - Program variable namespace.
      Returns:
      The parsed term.
      Throws:
      ParserException - In case of an error.

    • parseTerm

      public static JTerm parseTerm(String value, Proof proof)
      Parses a given term in String representation.
      Parameters:
      value - String to parse.
      proof - Proof object (for namespaces and Services object).
      Returns:
      The parsed term.

    • parseSV1

      public static TacletApp parseSV1(TacletApp app, VariableSV sv, String value, Services services)
      Instantiates a schema variable in the given taclet application. 1st pass: only VariableSV.
      Parameters:
      app - Application to instantiate.
      sv - VariableSV to instantiate.
      value - Name for the instantiated logic variable.
      services - The services object.
      Returns:
      An instantiated taclet application, where the schema variable has been instantiated by a logic variable of the given name.

    • parseSV2

      public static TacletApp parseSV2(TacletApp app, SchemaVariable sv, String value, Goal targetGoal)
      Instantiates a schema variable in the given taclet application. 2nd pass: All other schema variables.
      Parameters:
      app - Application to instantiate.
      sv - Schema variable to instantiate.
      value - Name for the instantiated Skolem constant, program element or term..
      targetGoal - The goal corresponding to the given application.
      Returns:
      An instantiated taclet application, where the schema variable has been instantiated, depending on its type, by a Skolem constant, program element, or term of the given name.
      See Also:
      • parseSV1(TacletApp, VariableSV, String, Services)
